nasb.text: (which all refer to things destined to perish with use)—in accordance with the commandments and teachings of men?

esv.text: (referring to things that all perish as they are used)—according to human precepts and teachings?

cnv.text: 這些規條是照著人的命令和教訓而定的，

ccb.text: 这些规条不过是人的戒律和说教，经不起实践的考验，

csbs.text: 这些东西都是一经使用就要衰朽的，是出于人的规条和教义；
